user_query: Have I received any emails in the last 7 days? List sender and subject.

plan.query: Have I received any emails in the last 7 days? List sender and subject.
plan.reasoning: The query specifically asks for information about received emails, which can be handled entirely by the graph agent.

steps.task: Retrieve emails received in the last 7 days and list their senders and subjects.

plan.synthesis: Present the results of step 1, detailing the senders and subjects of the retrieved emails.

invoked_agents.input: Retrieve emails received in the last 7 days and list their senders and subjects.
